evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long has only 1 observed VALID_0DTE trade, but it produced $91 with -11.7 MAE and 455 PnL/exposure hour. Broader 1DTE/fallback tightening reduced score and net profit, so the next non-repeated test should expand a clean option-confirmed profile rather than tighten existing high-throughput profiles.
name: Call Wall Acceptance Entry Sample Builder
risk: Single-trade evidence can overfit; looser DEX and call-volume thresholds may admit noisy continuation entries or steal fills from stronger pullback/squeeze profiles.
trigger: VALID_0DTE state with positive net DEX, positive forward DEX, accepted call-wall/strike context, and modest call-volume expansion.
validation_metric: At least 5 call_wall_acceptance_long trades, positive profile PnL, average MAE better than -60, worst MAE better than -100, total net profit at least 98% of run_001, and pnl_per_exposure_hour flat or better.
